title: Looking for someone to set-up Monday.com for Climate NGO
excerpt: We are a Climate NGO who would like to hire someone to help us transfer all of our spreadsheet contacts into Monday.com CRM and set it up for us working closely with our head of operations setting up workflows etc to hel…

posts.author: TatumKennedy (Tatum)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a Climate NGO who would like to hire someone to help us transfer all of our spreadsheet contacts into Monday.com CRM and set it up for us working closely with our head of operations setting up workflows etc to help us effectively manage all of our contacts on Monday.com then also give short training session to our team of 5. We are based in Europe so our time zone is CET. Please reach out at info@allrise.at if you are able to help with this.
